runner: Claude Sonnet 4.6 via Claude Code agent
notes: Single-file game: 5 plants (Sunflower, Peashooter, Wall-nut, Snow Pea, Cherry Bomb), 5 zombie types (Basic, Conehead, Buckethead, Runner, Gargantuar), 5 waves. Features: main menu, pause overlay, localStorage leaderboard with name entry, sun drops, cooldown bars, particle effects, HP bars, house HP. All canvas-drawn sprites.
